title: AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 10 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF TARLAC TO BE KNOWN AS "DANDING COJUANGCO DAY", IN COMMEMORATION OF THE BIRTH ANNIVERSARY OF EDUARDO "DANDING" MURPHY COJUANGCO, JR.

chunks.text:
Daily Tribune, May 6, 2022; 118 OG No. 20, 5602 (May 16, 2022)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11729, April 29, 2022 ]

AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 10 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF TARLAC TO BE KNOWN AS "DANDING COJUANGCO DAY", IN COMMEMORATION OF THE BIRTH ANNIVERSARY OF EDUARDO "DANDING" MURPHY COJUANGCO, JR.

By it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. June 10 of every year is hereby declared as special nonworking holiday in the Province of Tarlac to be known as "Danding Cojuangco Day", in commemoration of the birth anniversary of Eduardo "Danding" Murphy Cojuangco, Jr.

SEC. 2.

This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

LORD ALLAN JAY Q. VELASCO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on September 23, 2020 and January 17, 2022, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARK LLANDRO L. MENDOZA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 29 2022

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
